POS FILED AS TO KAREN KINAHAN ONLY
DISMISSAL OF DEFENDANT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT BY THE COURT WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-20-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-18-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 * DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. * CROSS-COMPLAINANT FAILED TO APPEAR. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINAHAN, PAUL & KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, PATRICK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,077.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PLT'S AUTHORIZATION TO PICK UP EXHIBIT FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, PATRICK
